name: url
label: URL
help: Facebook post URL the comment belongs to.

name: comment_id
label: Comment ID
help: ID of the parent comment to fetch replies for (from the comments endpoint).

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 50, max 500. Billed per result.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Responses are cached for 24 hours by default. Set false to bypass the cache and always fetch fresh data (default true).
